basic_details.job_title: GIMS Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Government Institute of Medical Sciences (GIMS), Greater Noida
basic_details.application_mode: Online filled application + Hard copy by Post/Speed Post
basic_details.short_information: GIMS Greater Noida is offering a prestigious 6 Months Fellowship in Diabetes Mellitus with hands-on training. The program is designed for medical graduates/postgraduates interested in diabetes care. Selected fellows will receive stipend as per UP Government norms.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be intimated to shortlisted candidates

application_fee.details: Application fee of Rs. 1,180/- (GST included) may be submitted online or through Demand Draft in favour of Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Greater Noida payable at Greater Noida.

age_limit.age_details: Less than 40 Years as on the date of application submission
age_limit.details: Less than 40 Years as on the date of application submission.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/MD/DNB/DCH degree from a university recognized by National Medical Council (NMC)
qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Less than 40 Years as on the date of application submission

salary_details.pay_scale: As admissible as per UP Govt. norms

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed. Printout of online filled application along with self-attested photocopies of all documents should be sent by registered/speed post.
how_to_apply: Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,180/- online or through DD.
Take printout of the filled application.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all documents.
Send by registered/speed post to: The Director, Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna, Greater Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP (India)-201310 Last Date: 25 July 2026
important_instructions: The fellowship is a 6 Months Hands-on Training Program. Stipend will be as per UP Government norms. No TA/DA will be provided for the interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about interview date and time.

content_sections.heading: GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Greater Noida invites applications for the Fellowship in Diabetes Mellitus (6 Months Program). The training is hands-on and focuses on comprehensive management of Diabetes and Metabolic disorders. The program is open to MBBS/MD/DNB/DCH qualified doctors.

content_sections.heading: GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: GIMS Greater Noida is offering a prestigious 6 Months Fellowship in Diabetes Mellitus with hands-on training. The program is designed for medical graduates/postgraduates interested in diabetes care. Selected fellows will receive stipend as per UP Government norms.

rows.government_institute_of_medical_sciences: As admissible as per UP Govt. norms
MBBS/MD/DNB/DCH degree from a university recognized by National Medical Council (NMC)
MD (General Medicine), Publications in the field of Diabetes and Metabolic disorders
Less than 40 Years as on the date of application submission
Online filled application + Hard copy by Post/Speed Post

content_sections.heading: GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Less than 40 Years as on the date of application submission.

content_sections.heading: GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee of Rs. 1,180/- (GST included) may be submitted online or through Demand Draft in favour of Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Greater Noida payable at Greater Noida.

content_sections.heading: GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed. Printout of online filled application along with self-attested photocopies of all documents should be sent by registered/speed post.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the online application form. Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,180/- online or through DD. Take printout of the filled application. Attach self-attested photocopies of all documents. Send by registered/speed post to: The Director, Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna, Greater Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP (India)-201310 Last Date: 25 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for GIMS Greater Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The fellowship is a 6 Months Hands-on Training Program. Stipend will be as per UP Government norms. No TA/DA will be provided for the interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about interview date and time.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GIMS Greater Noida Diabetes Fellowship 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many seats are available for Fellowship in Diabetes Mellitus at GIMS Greater Noida?
faq.answer: There are 02 seats available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the duration of the Diabetes Fellowship program at GIMS?
faq.answer: The program duration is 6 Months (Hands-on Training).

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for Diabetes Fellowship at GIMS Greater Noida?
faq.answer: Stipend is as admissible as per UP Govt. norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the essential qualification for GIMS Diabetes Fellowship?
faq.answer: MBBS/MD/DNB/DCH degree from a university recognized by National Medical Council (NMC).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for GIMS Greater Noida Fellowship in Diabetes Mellitus?
faq.answer: Fill online application, pay Rs. 1,180/- fee, and send hard copy by post to the Director, GIMS Greater Noida by 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for GIMS Diabetes Fellowship?
faq.answer: Less than 40 Years as on the date of application submission.

faq.question: Q8. Is MD in General Medicine desirable for the Diabetes Fellowship?
faq.answer: Yes, MD (General Medicine) and publications in Diabetes/Metabolic disorders are desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Diabetes Fellowship at GIMS Greater Noida a paid program?
faq.answer: Yes, selected fellows will receive stipend as per UP Government norms.

faq.question: Q10. Where is GIMS Greater Noida located?
faq.answer: Kasna, Greater Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh.
